HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT STEVEN HARRISON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. STEVEN HARRISON HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT STEVEN HARRISON'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. STEVEN HARRISON HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL FEES AND COSTS SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)

REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: ANSWER PREVIOUSLY STRICKEN...THERE ARE NO OTHER DOCUMENTS TO STRIKE.
ORDER STRIKING THE ANSWER OF STEVEN HARRISON HAS BEEN VACATED. STEVEN HARRISON'S ANSWER IS HEREBY REINSTATED.

APPEARANCES:
Jesus Lopez, property manager, representing plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic.
Arnold Evje representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Steven Harrison is present.
J.R. Gabbard representing the defendant by limited scope.

This matters comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. Litigants, counsel and Judge Pro Tem confer privately.

Settlement is reached, trial date is off calendar.
